title: 2.11 Renowned Ethiopian Botanist
description: Renowned Ethiopian botanist — every fact from the textbook.

questions.question: Who is the renowned Ethiopian botanist profiled in this section?
What is Professor Sebsebe Demissew a professor of?
At which university is Professor Sebsebe Demissew a professor?
Where is Professor Sebsebe Demissew the Executive Director?
options: Gullele Botanic Garden in Addis Ababa
questions.correctAnswer: Gullele Botanic Garden in Addis Ababa

questions.question: In which year was Professor Sebsebe Demissew awarded the Kew international medal?
In which year was Professor Sebsebe Demissew elected as a Foreign Member of the Royal Society in London?
What distinction does Professor Sebsebe Demissew hold regarding the Royal Society?
options: He is the only Ethiopian in the Royal Society
He is the first Sub-Saharan African scientist elected in the Societys 357-year history
He is the youngest member ever elected
He is the first plant scientist elected
questions.correctAnswer: He is the first Sub-Saharan African scientist elected in the Societys 357-year history

questions.question: What award was Professor Sebsebe Demissew awarded in 2021?
options: Cuatrcases Medal for Excellence in Tropical Botany
questions.correctAnswer: Cuatrcases Medal for Excellence in Tropical Botany

questions.question: Which institution awarded the Cuatrcases Medal to Professor Sebsebe Demissew?
options: Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History, USA
questions.correctAnswer: Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History, USA

questions.question: What was the Cuatrcases Medal awarded for?
options: His lifetime works in conserving and recording the very diverse Ethiopian flora with many endemic species
questions.correctAnswer: His lifetime works in conserving and recording the very diverse Ethiopian flora with many endemic species

questions.question: What leadership roles did Professor Sebsebe Demissew hold that contributed to his award?
options: Leadership of the Ethiopian flora project and the Ethiopian National Herbarium at Addis Ababa University
questions.correctAnswer: Leadership of the Ethiopian flora project and the Ethiopian National Herbarium at Addis Ababa University
